_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Knowledge of relevant laws, regulations, and policies.
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of regulatory enforcement mechanisms, including supervisory authority powers, penalty structures, precedent enforcement actions, and the distinction between binding requirements, regulatory guidance, and industry codes of conduct.
comments: DCWF ksa superset of WIDAI RC domain. RC-K-008 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: RC-K-005 (RC, cosine: 0.606), DG-K-008 (DG, cosine: 0.599).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 6.5/10 (raw 0.648). Shared vocabulary: [knowledge]. DCWF-only terms [laws, policies, regulations, relevant] vs WIDAI-only terms [actions, authority, binding, codes, conduct, distinction] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.879 (P=0.906, R=0.854). P exceeds R by 0.052 — the DCWF element's 7 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 27 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.7%). "Knowledge of relevant laws, regulations, and policies." and "Knowledge of regulatory enforcement mechanisms, including supervisory authority" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.653 ≈ STS 0.648 (gap 0.005). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [knowledge] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 11.1%. Shared tokens: [knowledge]. DCWF-only: [laws, policies, regulations, relevant]. WIDAI-only: [actions, authority, binding, codes, conduct, distinction].
